assertions.reason: The architecture review set exists and the README explicitly links the architecture overview and dependency map, while the two docs contain module-boundary and coupling-hotspot sections required by the contract.

evidence.observed: Foundation artifacts table links `architecture-overview.md` as the platform-shape/module-boundary doc and `dependency-map.md` as the cross-module coupling-hotspot doc.
Contains `## Platform shape`, `## Entrypoints and controller surfaces`, `## Module boundaries`, and `## Shared infrastructure`, matching the required architecture overview surface.
Contains `## Cross-module dependencies`, `## Dependency clusters`, and `## Coupling hotspots`, providing the required dependency/coupling narrative.
Read-only validator confirmed README links both docs, `## Module boundaries` exists in architecture-overview.md, and `## Coupling hotspots` exists in dependency-map.md.

frictions: Task tool delegation to user-testing-flow-validator failed in this environment with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-xhigh`; validation fell back to direct in-session docs inspection per .factory/library/user-testing.md.
